_comment: Per-project config for scripts/readiness.py. Copy to your repo root as release_readiness.json, fill available_models + signals, and append one panel object per review panel.

panels._example: Append one object per panel. findings counts NEW confirmed defects by severity; an empty {} is a clean panel. models lists the distinct models that participated.
panels.note: <one-line summary of what was found and fixed>
